insight_mqb45_im508s_dealer_key.title: IM508S may require dealer-key generation from saved IMMO data on MQB 4.5
insight_mqb45_im508s_dealer_key.trigger: The standard Add Key routine does not generate the dealer key
insight_mqb45_im508s_dealer_key.recommendation: Save the IMMO backup, exit Add Key, open the saved IMMO file, generate and write the dealer key, then return to the vehicle and complete Add Key programming
insight_mqb45_im508s_dealer_key.why: This route was required on a successful workshop job when the normal Add Key path did not generate the dealer key
